title: Argon Tableware Glass Jars with Airtight Metal Clip Lid - 200ml/6.7oz - 3 Pack - 4 Colour Seals - Small Kitchen Storage Container Round Preserving Jar for Pickling, Chutney, Jam, Coffee
features: 🌾 Rustic Farmhouse Style & Practical Design – The Argon Tableware 200ml Glass Storage Jar combines vintage farmhouse charm with modern functionality. Perfect for chutneys, jams, pickles, spices, herbs, coffee, or sauces, it brings timeless elegance to your kitchen.

🔒 Airtight Freshness with Silicone Seal – Features a stainless steel clip-top lid and an orange silicone ring that outperforms traditional rubber. This airtight preserving jar locks in flavour and keeps food fresh, dry, and protected from moisture.

📏 Compact & Versatile 200ml Capacity – With dimensions of 8.5cm tall x 7.5cm wide, this round glass jar is ideal for smaller kitchen essentials. Great for homemade preserves, spice storage, dry goods, or as a stylish mini pantry container.

💎 Durable Glass & Reliable Build – Crafted from strong, clear glass with a robust stainless steel locking mechanism, this airtight glass jar is built for everyday use in home kitchens, cafés, or professional catering. Eco-friendly and reusable.

🛒 Part of a Complete Storage Collection – The Argon Tableware Glass Jar range spans from 70ml up to 3000ml (3 litres), offering versatile storage for everything from herbs, nuts, and seeds to cereals, pasta, sauces, and pickled goods. Build your set today!
description: Product Description For a cool and contemporary storage solution why not try Argon Tableware’s extensive collection of Glass Storage Jars and Canisters? Serving up an array of shapes, sizes and lids, you're sure to find the perfect style to fit your kitchen décor! On Trend Designs Rolled edges creates a smooth glass effect and the variety of lids offer up a scandi appeal Airtight Seal on all Lids Keeps foods fresh for longer A Wide Array of Styles Available Find a style which fits your home and kitchen décor!
